title: New Cruel Angels Thesis remaster June 20
display_title: New Cruel Angels Thesis remaster June 20
wikitext:
[]: New Cruel Angel's Thesis remaster (June 20)             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri May 18, 2018 5:06 am [url]https://www.amazon.co.jp/【早期購入特典あり】-残酷な天使のテーゼ-魂のルフラン-メーカー多売-ステッカー/dp/B07C8XJJKV/ref=redir_mobile_desktop?_encoding=UTF8&psc=1&ref_=ya_aw_od_pi[/url] Purchasing it through that link, you get a sticker for free apparently. Cover was drawn by Masayuki apparently (according to khara's twitter).

[]: Re: New Cruel Angel's Thesis remaster (June 20)             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Fri May 18, 2018 9:36 am I like how they explicitly state it can be shipped to the US. Seems like a good buy too... less than $10.00 with the current market exchange. I wonder if Prime will cover the two day shipping from Japan

[]: Re: New Cruel Angel's Thesis remaster (June 20)             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Mon May 21, 2018 11:55 am This news: https://www.koi-nya.net/2018/05/20/yoko-takahashi-hara-la-gira-internacional-evangelion-world-tour-para-promocionar-su-nuevo-single/ is in Spanish, but what it says is that Yoko Takahashi will be on an "Evangelion World Tour", the first concert will be at the Eva Store, where a new music video directed by Masayuki will be streamed.
